title: peucedanum terebinthaceum var. deltoideum
intro: Peucedanum terebinthaceum var. deltoideum, also known as the sweet cicely, is a biennial or perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a carminative and antispasmodic, to ease digestive issues and relieve muscle spasms. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of sweet cicely include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including indigestion and menstrual cramps.
